VAL-GS-004: results sorted by timestamp desc (most recent first)
VAL-GS-005: empty/whitespace query returns total=0 and empty results
VAL-GS-006: client.search() posts to /search with correct payload

notes: All 557 tests pass (34 new tests added vs 523 baseline).
Gmail search uses native Gmail API q= parameter for server-side filtering.
Calendar search uses Google Calendar API q= parameter over ±180 day window.
iMessage, Notes, Reminders use SQLite LIKE for substring matching.
Ctrl+\ binding used for search overlay (Ctrl+/ not available as Textual binding name).
call_from_thread accessed via self.app in SearchScreen worker due to pyright type limitation.
